trans-unit.source: The backend request could not be sent. Please verify the network connection.
Please enable Data Processing Consent first.
The backend returned an invalid JSON response: %1
The backend response does not contain a tenant_id.
The backend response does not contain an api_token.
The backend sync request could not be sent. Please verify the network connection.
The backend delete request could not be sent. Please verify the network connection.
The backend reconcile request could not be sent. Please verify the network connection.
The API token is missing. Please register the tenant again.
The dashboard token service could not be reached.
The dashboard token service returned an error. Status: %1. Response: %2
The dashboard token service returned invalid JSON: %1
The field "token" is missing in the dashboard token response.
The billing checkout request could not be sent. Please verify the network connection.
The billing checkout response is not valid JSON: %1
The billing checkout response does not contain checkout_url.
Please enable at least one scan module on the BCSentinel setup page.
Please configure API Base URL first.
Multiple customers with the same email: %1
Multiple vendors with the same email: %1
Multiple customers with the same VAT registration no.: %1
Multiple vendors with the same VAT registration no.: %1
Multiple customers with the same name/post code/city: %1 | %2 %3
Multiple vendors with the same name/post code/city: %1 | %2 %3
Could not parse decimal value from backend JSON: %1
FÃ¼r den Issue-Code %1 ist aktuell noch keine direkte Bearbeitungsliste hinterlegt.
Estimated potential loss caused by poor data quality.
Total affected records across all findings.
Open the secure BCSentinel checkout to activate Premium.
Please select a dashboard entry first.
Do you want to delete the selected dashboard from %1?
This will align the backend scan history with the current BC scan list and remove orphan backend scans. Continue?
Open the external BCSentinel dashboard for this scan.
Open the external BCSentinel dashboard for the current scan.
Refresh current plan and license status from BCSentinel.
No deep scan run is available.
No valid dashboard token was returned by the token service.
Please enter the API Base URL in DH Setup first.
Please register the tenant in DH Setup first.
Please register the tenant in DH Setup first so that an API token is stored.
The token service response is not valid JSON.
The field "token" is missing in the token service response.
The monitor is only available for deep scans.
No deep scan run was found for %1.
Do you want to delete scan %1?
Scan history successfully synchronized with the backend.
Please select at least one scan.
Do you want to delete %1 selected scans?
Missing issue code for drilldown launch.
Optional FlowFilter to limit the view to one location.
Opens the external Data Health Management Analytics dashboard.
No valid token was found in the token service response.
Opens the Data Health Management Analytics dashboard in a new browser tab. Backend: %1
The token service could not be reached.
The token service returned an error. Status: %1. Response: %2
The correction was not logged because no master data record could be assigned.
Shows whether premium actions are unlocked.
Base URL of the BCSentinel API. Default is production.
Must be enabled before tenant registration and scan synchronization.
Shows whether premium recommendations, drilldowns, worklists, and related premium details are unlocked.
Include system and setup checks in the deep scan.
Include finance-related checks in the deep scan.
Include sales-related checks in the deep scan.
Include purchasing-related checks in the deep scan.
Include inventory-related checks in the deep scan.
Include CRM/contact-related checks in the deep scan.
Include manufacturing and production master data checks in the deep scan.
Include service-related checks in the deep scan.
Include jobs and project-related checks in the deep scan.
Include employee and resource-related checks in the deep scan.
Do you want to start the scan now? Performance may be affected during live operations. We recommend running the scan outside business hours.
Please configure the API Base URL first.
The token response is not valid JSON.
The token field is missing in the response.
API Base URL must start with http:// or https://
API Base URL is too long.
